name: Water Vapor Isotope Measurements at Antarctic Station
description: Dataset containing water vapor isotope measurements (δ18O H2O, δD H2O vapour, d xs) along with meteorological parameters (WV mix ratio, height) collected at an Antarctic station. Includes temporal coverage from 2017-02-17 to 2019-01-31 and spatial coordinates at latitude -70.65, longitude -8.25, elevation 42.0 meters.
